queries.question: Display network admins and IT consultants whose salary is $70,000.
queries.sql:
SELECT Network_Admin.Position as Position
FROM Network_Admin
WHERE Network_Admin.Salary = "$70,000"
UNION
SELECT IT_Consultant.Type as Position
FROM IT_Consultant
WHERE IT_Consultant.Salary = "$70,000"
